TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u Madagascar sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 20 00 S, 47 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 587,041 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 581,540 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 5,501 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 24,430,325. kakalukan umah sa 71.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 21.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 7.40%. (Califomia), (Bomeo). . Madagascar subal a kitidaan mikitabaki tu Amilika California (Ca-Li-For-Ni-Ya Śä†Śą©Á¶ŹŚįľšļěŚ∑ě), u satabakiay nu sakasepat a kitakit nu subal, mikilu tu Greenland , New Guinea (Sin-Ci-Ney-Ya śĖįŚĻĺŚÖßšļě) atu Puo-Luo-Cuo (Bomeo) . Madagascar a subal idai India a bayu nuatipan, u culil tu laad nu Amilika nutipan a dadipasan nu bayu mibatad. (Antananarivo), . namakay nutipan a San Francisco katukuh i Madagascar a tusu, An-Ta-Na-Na-Li'-Fuo (Antananarivo) , sawusi nuni bahelan nu hikuki han makaala tu 17,700 km (11,000ŤčĪťáĆ), makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a tatukian mikacaw tu hikuki mabahel. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Antananarivo . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 26 bulad 6 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Andry Rajoelina (AndeliÔľéLaciyawlina ŚģČŚĺ∑ťáĆ¬∑śčČŚĖ¨Śą©Áīć), 1974 a mihca 5 a bulad 30 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Madagascar ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihca 1 bulad 19 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Madagascar ayza sa ci Christian Ntsay , micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcaan 6 bulad 6 demiad. kakitidaan a sapupu (the Tsaratanana Massif), . Madagascar lima kuni ka babenisan tu kitidaan: inuwalian a dadipasan ,amis a (Cai-La-Ta-Na-Na ŚĮüśčČŚ°ĒÁīćÁīć) a buyu' (the Tsaratanana Massif), inutebanan a talakaway a buyu', inutipan a bayu nu dadipasan atu nutipan timulan a kitidaan. teban nu talakawayay a buyu' nu kitidaan, timulan amisan satanayu sa nu subal, micapi tu bayu han makaala tu walu a lasubu(800)~ cacay a malebut walu a lasubu (1800) a kunce nu buyuan.Tsaratanana a buyu' itidai subal nu amisan, u hamim nu subal a talakaway nu buyu'. . Madagascar u sumanahay namim kuyu lala' sisa pangangan han tu "tabakiyay nu sumanahay a subal" han , sumanahay a lala' milaecus tu nipaluma' tu tuudtuud. Madagascar nutipan atu amisan idaw ku micidekay a nu ba'tuan se-huy-yan . (Tsingy de Bemaraha National Park), . sasi nganganay a Cin-Ci dadiputan a kitidaan (Tsingy de Bemaraha National Park) . mihmihcaan numapaudad a makan, sisa mala micidakay nu se-huy-yan tai-ti sa. demiad u wayway tu nu lala'an a kitidaan, Madagascar a demiad katinengan kunika sasumad nu demiadan. Madagascar taneng malatusa ku demiad nuheni, namakayda i sabaw cacayay a bulad katukuh tu saka tusa a mihcan nu sepatay a bulad a nikasengetan caledes nu udadan a demiad, atu lima a bulad katukuh i pulu'a bulad sinika sapi'an tu a nidakedal nu demiad. subal nu waliyan nu dadipasan u masengetay a kakitidaan, idaw ku masa caledasay nu langaw a kilakilangan nu niyaduan. sisa, nina niyadu' han katayniyan nu puu' a tabakiya nu caledes nu bali atu masaliyutay a tabakiay nu bali. . tebanan nu talakaway a buyu nu kitidaan kala sapi'sapi'an atu kala acakacakan nu demiad, u Madagascar hatidaaytu nu kaliwmaah itini i niyaduan ku kakalukan, sangaleben ku tipus ni paluma'an. . nutipan a dadipasan han u kakedalan nu lalangawan nu mahetikay a papah nu mulangawaay a kitidaan. kakedalan hantu i enemay a bulad katukuh tu waluway a bulad, u kahetikan nu papah a kilakilangan. katayniyan satu nu udad sa, nika langdaw nu papah mapaadin i bayu bangacal sa adihan. Madagascar a subal saacakay nu demiad a subal sa i nutipan timulan a kitidaan. caay ka hina udad sisa, nina kitidaan hantu u adidi nu likelikenan a niyadu'. aadupan Madagascar idaw ku masahicahicay itini i kitakit nu satalakaway nu yadahay a aadihan tu aadupan atu kilakilangan. . itini i Madagascar maadih kiya 200,000 a tuudan nu lalangawan , kiya idaw ku 150,000 nu niyadu'ay a cancanan nu aadihan a lalangawan, u micidekay nu cancanan a lalangawan nu kitakitay dumaan a kitidaan inai ku langaw u sakaetiman nu lalangawan. . subal idaw ku micidekay a cilakay, pulung han makaala tu lima a bataan nu mahidaay u kapulusay a salu , siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa a kilac (99%) nu Madagascar a balaut, atu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu mabahelay a ayam. . Madagascar u micidekay nu cilekayan a niyadu'an, itini i kitakit han cacay a lasubu a kilac (100%) nu mahidaay u kapulus nu salu , hina sumaday nu kakitil palung nu pangkiwan nuheni, atu enem a kilacan (6%) numi cidekay nu balaut (nika i nai ku kakunas) itida nami i subal amaudip. (Africa). idaw kumaadihay i Madagascar kaadihan nu mahicahicaay a aadihan tu cancanan, u lalumaan a maudip sa itini mulangaw i Na-tay-pin-yung atu Na-mi-cuo , caay kai tida i Fa-cuo Africa . tademaw sakay sayaway i Madagascar nu muenengay silumaay itida nu cinglaw. (Indonesians),ŤÄĆšłćśėĮťĚěśī≤ťĽĎšļļ(black Africans), . mikinkiway tu tademaw a tademawan han saan i tusa a malebud nu sayaway muenengay i Madagascar a tademaw u Indonesia a tademaw (ŚćįŚįľšļļ, Indonesians)caay kaw Fa-cuo lumeniay a tademaw (ťĚěśī≤ťĽĎšļļ, black Africans) sa, kilul satu ida ku namaka Fa-cuo-ta-lu tayda mabulaw katuku i Madagascar . idaw ku pabaliyuway tu Madagascar a tademaw, nababalaki nuheni mahka maka tuku i subal sa, u Indonesia a tademaw (ŚćįŚįľšļļ, Indonesians)atu Africa a tedemaw (Africans, ťĚěśī≤šļļ) umalamelay nu miduducay a tademaw sa. (Arabs)ŚíĆŚćįŚļ¶šļļ(Indians)) . anuhicasa, katuuday numikikiway a tademaw saan, Madagascar u aydaay henay nu patidenga asiluma nu muenengay (itini i Madagascar , inai henay ku secisetay a nisulitan nu ba'tuay a mihecaan ), numikilulay satu nu dumaan a binacadan a mabulaw sa(tinaku sa A-la-puo a tademaw (ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ (Arabs)) atu Indu' (ŚćįŚļ¶šļļ(Indians)) malalamel aca tu i niyaduay a tademaw.
S.PHON: u madagas ¶ar sa i r~…ĺabu nu afri ¶a , itiza i ** ** s, ** ** …ô. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku ***,*** km*. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa *.**%. ( ¶ar~…ĺifomia), (bom…ôo). . madagas ¶ar subar~…ĺ a kitidaan mikitabaki tu amir~…ĺika ¶ar~…ĺifornia ( ¶a-r~…ĺi-for-ni-ja ******), u satabakiaj nu sakas…ôpat a kitakit nu subar~…ĺ, mikir~…ĺu tu gr…ô…ônr~…ĺand , n…ôw guin…ôa (sin- ¶i-n…ô-ja ****) atu puo-r~…ĺuo- ¶uo (bom…ôo) . madagas ¶ar a subar~…ĺ idai india a baju nuatipan, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaad nu amir~…ĺika nutipan a dadipasan nu baju mibatad. (antananari*o), . namakaj nutipan a san fran ¶is ¶o katukuńß i madagas ¶ar a tusu, an-ta-na-na-r~…ĺi Ē~ °-fuo (antananari*o) , sawusi nuni bańß…ôr~…ĺan nu ńßikuki ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu **,*** km (**,*****), makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a tatukian mika ¶aw tu ńßikuki mabańß…ôr~…ĺ. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u antananari*o . kakiŇčiŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiŇčiŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) ajza sa ¶i andrj *ajo…ôr~…ĺina (and…ôr~…ĺi*r~…ĺa ¶ijawr~…ĺina ********), **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu madagas ¶ar ajza, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad. ¶unr~…ĺi u ¶unr~…ĺi nu madagas ¶ar ajza sa ¶i ¶ńßristian ntsaj , mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. kakitidaan a sapupu (tńß…ô tsaratanana massif), . madagas ¶ar r~…ĺima kuni ka bab…ônisan tu kitidaan: inuwar~…ĺian a dadipasan ,amis a ( ¶ai-r~…ĺa-ta-na-na *****) a buju Ē~ ° (tńß…ô tsaratanana massif), inut…ôbanan a tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, inutipan a baju nu dadipasan atu nutipan timur~…ĺan a kitidaan. t…ôban nu tar~…ĺakawajaj a buju Ē~ ° nu kitidaan, timur~…ĺan amisan satanaju sa nu subar~…ĺ, mi ¶api tu baju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu(***)~ ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu (****) a kun ¶…ô nu bujuan.tsaratanana a buju Ē~ ° itidai subar~…ĺ nu amisan, u ńßamim nu subar~…ĺ a tar~…ĺakawaj nu buju Ē~ °. . madagas ¶ar u sumanańßaj namim kuju r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "tabakijaj nu sumanańßaj a subar~…ĺ" ńßan , sumanańßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tuudtuud. madagas ¶ar nutipan atu amisan idaw ku mi ¶id…ôkaj a nu ba Ē~ °tuan s…ô-ńßuj-jan . (tsiŇčj d…ô b…ômarańßa nationar~…ĺ park), . sasi ŇčaŇčanaj a ¶in- ¶i dadiputan a kitidaan (tsiŇčj d…ô b…ômarańßa nationar~…ĺ park) . mińßmińß ¶aan numapaudad a makan, sisa mar~…ĺa mi ¶idakaj nu s…ô-ńßuj-jan tai-ti sa. d…ômiad u wajwaj tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a kitidaan, madagas ¶ar a d…ômiad katin…ôŇčan kunika sasumad nu d…ômiadan. madagas ¶ar tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺatusa ku d…ômiad nuńß…ôni, namakajda i sabaw ¶a ¶ajaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu saka tusa a mińß ¶an nu s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad a nikas…ôŇč…ôtan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs nu udadan a d…ômiad, atu r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad katukuńß i pur~…ĺu Ē~ °a bur~…ĺad sinika sapi Ē~ °an tu a nidak…ôdar~…ĺ nu d…ômiad. subar~…ĺ nu war~…ĺijan nu dadipasan u mas…ôŇč…ôtaj a kakitidaan, idaw ku masa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôdasaj nu r~…ĺaŇčaw a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nu nijaduan. sisa, nina nijadu Ē~ ° ńßan katajnijan nu puu Ē~ ° a tabakija nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs nu bar~…ĺi atu masar~…ĺijutaj a tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺi. . t…ôbanan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a buju nu kitidaan kar~…ĺa sapi Ē~ °sapi Ē~ °an atu kar~…ĺa a ¶aka ¶akan nu d…ômiad, u madagas ¶ar ńßatidaajtu nu kar~…ĺiwmaańß itini i nijaduan ku kakar~…ĺukan, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb…ôn ku tipus ni par~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. . nutipan a dadipasan ńßan u kak…ôdar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu mańß…ôtikaj a papańß nu mur~…ĺaŇčawaaj a kitidaan. kak…ôdar~…ĺan ńßantu i …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu war~…ĺuwaj a bur~…ĺad, u kańß…ôtikan nu papańß a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan. katajnijan satu nu udad sa, nika r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu papańß mapaadin i baju baŇča ¶ar~…ĺ sa adińßan. madagas ¶ar a subar~…ĺ saa ¶akaj nu d…ômiad a subar~…ĺ sa i nutipan timur~…ĺan a kitidaan. ¶aaj ka ńßina udad sisa, nina kitidaan ńßantu u adidi nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a nijadu Ē~ °. aadupan madagas ¶ar idaw ku masańßi ¶ańßi ¶aj itini i kitakit nu satar~…ĺakawaj nu jadańßaj a aadińßan tu aadupan atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan. . itini i madagas ¶ar maadińß kija ***,*** a tuudan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan , kija idaw ku ***,*** nu nijadu Ē~ °aj a ¶an ¶anan nu aadińßan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶an ¶anan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu kitakitaj dumaan a kitidaan inai ku r~…ĺaŇčaw u saka…ôtiman nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . subar~…ĺ idaw ku mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶ir~…ĺakaj, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a bataan nu mańßidaaj u kapur~…ĺusaj a sar~…ĺu , siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa a kir~…ĺa ¶ (**%) nu madagas ¶ar a bar~…ĺaut, atu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm nu mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj a ajam. . madagas ¶ar u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan a nijadu Ē~ °an, itini i kitakit ńßan ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a kir~…ĺa ¶ (***%) nu mańßidaaj u kapur~…ĺus nu sar~…ĺu , ńßina sumadaj nu kakitir~…ĺ par~…ĺuŇč nu paŇčkiwan nuńß…ôni, atu …ôn…ôm a kir~…ĺa ¶an (*%) numi ¶id…ôkaj nu bar~…ĺaut (nika i nai ku kakunas) itida nami i subar~…ĺ amaudip. (afri ¶a). idaw kumaadińßaj i madagas ¶ar kaadińßan nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a aadińßan tu ¶an ¶anan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan a maudip sa itini mur~…ĺaŇčaw i na-taj-pin-juŇč atu na-mi- ¶uo , ¶aaj kai tida i fa- ¶uo afri ¶a . tad…ômaw sakaj sajawaj i madagas ¶ar nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj sir~…ĺumaaj itida nu ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw. (indon…ôsians),*******(br~…ĺa ¶k afri ¶ans), . mikinkiwaj tu tad…ômaw a tad…ômawan ńßan saan i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud nu sajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i madagas ¶ar a tad…ômaw u indon…ôsia a tad…ômaw (***, indon…ôsians) ¶aaj kaw fa- ¶uo r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw (****, br~…ĺa ¶k afri ¶ans) sa, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ida ku namaka fa- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu tajda mabur~…ĺaw katuku i madagas ¶ar . idaw ku pabar~…ĺijuwaj tu madagas ¶ar a tad…ômaw, nababar~…ĺaki nuńß…ôni mańßka maka tuku i subar~…ĺ sa, u indon…ôsia a tad…ômaw (***, indon…ôsians)atu afri ¶a a t…ôd…ômaw (afri ¶ans, ***) umar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu midudu ¶aj a tad…ômaw sa. (arabs)****(indians)) . anuńßi ¶asa, katuudaj numikikiwaj a tad…ômaw saan, madagas ¶ar u ajdaaj ńß…ônaj nu patid…ôŇča asir~…ĺuma nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj (itini i madagas ¶ar , inai ńß…ônaj ku s…ô ¶is…ôtaj a nisur~…ĺitan nu ba Ē~ °tuaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ), numikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj satu nu dumaan a bina ¶adan a mabur~…ĺaw sa(tinaku sa a-r~…ĺa-puo a tad…ômaw (**** (arabs)) atu indu Ē~ ° (***(indians)) mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a ¶a tu i nijaduaj a tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: u Madagascar sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 20 00 S, 47 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 587,041 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 581,540 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 5,501 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 24,430,325. kakalukan umah sa 71.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 21.50%, zumaay henay umah sa 7.40%. (Califomia), (Bomeo). . Madagascar subal a kitidaan mikitabaki tu Amilika California (Ca-Li-For-Ni-Ya Śä†Śą©Á¶ŹŚįľšļěŚ∑ě), u satabakiay nu sakasepat a kitakit nu subal, mikilu tu Greenland , New Guinea (Sin-Ci-Ney-Ya śĖįŚĻĺŚÖßšļě) atu Puo-Luo-Cuo (Bomeo) . Madagascar a subal idai India a bayu nuatipan, u culil tu laad nu Amilika nutipan a dadipasan nu bayu mibatad. (Antananarivo), . namakay nutipan a San Francisco katukuh i Madagascar a tusu, An-Ta-Na-Na-Li'-Fuo (Antananarivo) , sawusi nuni bahelan nu hikuki han makaala tu 17,700 km (11,000ŤčĪťáĆ), makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku tulu a tatukian mikacaw tu hikuki mabahel. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Antananarivo . kakingingan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 26 bulad 6 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Andry Rajoelina (AndeliÔľéLaciyawlina ŚģČŚĺ∑ťáĆ¬∑śčČŚĖ¨Śą©Áīć), 1974 a mihca 5 a bulad 30 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Madagascar ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2019 a mihca 1 bulad 19 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Madagascar ayza sa ci Christian Ntsay , micakat a demiad sa i 2018 a mihcaan 6 bulad 6 demiad. kakitidaan a sapupu (the Tsaratanana Massif), . Madagascar lima kuni ka babenisan tu kitidaan: inuwalian a dadipasan ,amis a (Cai-La-Ta-Na-Na ŚĮüśčČŚ°ĒÁīćÁīć) a buyu' (the Tsaratanana Massif), inutebanan a talakaway a buyu', inutipan a bayu nu dadipasan atu nutipan timulan a kitidaan. teban nu talakawayay a buyu' nu kitidaan, timulan amisan satanayu sa nu subal, micapi tu bayu han makaala tu walu a lasubu(800)~ cacay a malebut walu a lasubu (1800) a kunce nu buyuan.Tsaratanana a buyu' itidai subal nu amisan, u hamim nu subal a talakaway nu buyu'. . Madagascar u sumanahay namim kuyu lala' sisa pangangan han tu "tabakiyay nu sumanahay a subal" han , sumanahay a lala' milaecus tu nipaluma' tu tuudtuud. Madagascar nutipan atu amisan idaw ku micidekay a nu ba'tuan se-huy-yan . (Tsingy de Bemaraha National Park), . sasi nganganay a Cin-Ci dadiputan a kitidaan (Tsingy de Bemaraha National Park) . mihmihcaan numapaudad a makan, sisa mala micidakay nu se-huy-yan tai-ti sa. demiad u wayway tu nu lala'an a kitidaan, Madagascar a demiad katinengan kunika sasumad nu demiadan. Madagascar taneng malatusa ku demiad nuheni, namakayda i sabaw cacayay a bulad katukuh tu saka tusa a mihcan nu sepatay a bulad a nikasengetan caledes nu udadan a demiad, atu lima a bulad katukuh i pulu'a bulad sinika sapi'an tu a nidakedal nu demiad. subal nu waliyan nu dadipasan u masengetay a kakitidaan, idaw ku masa caledasay nu langaw a kilakilangan nu niyaduan. sisa, nina niyadu' han katayniyan nu puu' a tabakiya nu caledes nu bali atu masaliyutay a tabakiay nu bali. . tebanan nu talakaway a buyu nu kitidaan kala sapi'sapi'an atu kala acakacakan nu demiad, u Madagascar hatidaaytu nu kaliwmaah itini i niyaduan ku kakalukan, sangaleben ku tipus ni paluma'an. . nutipan a dadipasan han u kakedalan nu lalangawan nu mahetikay a papah nu mulangawaay a kitidaan. kakedalan hantu i enemay a bulad katukuh tu waluway a bulad, u kahetikan nu papah a kilakilangan. katayniyan satu nu udad sa, nika langdaw nu papah mapaadin i bayu bangacal sa adihan. Madagascar a subal saacakay nu demiad a subal sa i nutipan timulan a kitidaan. caay ka hina udad sisa, nina kitidaan hantu u adidi nu likelikenan a niyadu'. aadupan Madagascar idaw ku masahicahicay itini i kitakit nu satalakaway nu yadahay a aadihan tu aadupan atu kilakilangan. . itini i Madagascar maadih kiya 200,000 a tuudan nu lalangawan , kiya idaw ku 150,000 nu niyadu'ay a cancanan nu aadihan a lalangawan, u micidekay nu cancanan a lalangawan nu kitakitay dumaan a kitidaan inai ku langaw u sakaetiman nu lalangawan. . subal idaw ku micidekay a cilakay, pulung han makaala tu lima a bataan nu mahidaay u kapulusay a salu , siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa a kilac (99%) nu Madagascar a balaut, atu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu mabahelay a ayam. . Madagascar u micidekay nu cilekayan a niyadu'an, itini i kitakit han cacay a lasubu a kilac (100%) nu mahidaay u kapulus nu salu , hina sumaday nu kakitil palung nu pangkiwan nuheni, atu enem a kilacan (6%) numi cidekay nu balaut (nika i nai ku kakunas) itida nami i subal amaudip. (Africa). idaw kumaadihay i Madagascar kaadihan nu mahicahicaay a aadihan tu cancanan, u lalumaan a maudip sa itini mulangaw i Na-tay-pin-yung atu Na-mi-cuo , caay kai tida i Fa-cuo Africa . tademaw sakay sayaway i Madagascar nu muenengay silumaay itida nu cinglaw. (Indonesians),ŤÄĆšłćśėĮťĚěśī≤ťĽĎšļļ(black Africans), . mikinkiway tu tademaw a tademawan han saan i tusa a malebud nu sayaway muenengay i Madagascar a tademaw u Indonesia a tademaw (ŚćįŚįľšļļ, Indonesians)caay kaw Fa-cuo lumeniay a tademaw (ťĚěśī≤ťĽĎšļļ, black Africans) sa, kilul satu ida ku namaka Fa-cuo-ta-lu tayda mabulaw katuku i Madagascar . idaw ku pabaliyuway tu Madagascar a tademaw, nababalaki nuheni mahka maka tuku i subal sa, u Indonesia a tademaw (ŚćįŚįľšļļ, Indonesians)atu Africa a tedemaw (Africans, ťĚěśī≤šļļ) umalamelay nu miduducay a tademaw sa. (Arabs)ŚíĆŚćįŚļ¶šļļ(Indians)) . anuhicasa, katuuday numikikiway a tademaw saan, Madagascar u aydaay henay nu patidenga asiluma nu muenengay (itini i Madagascar , inai henay ku secisetay a nisulitan nu ba'tuay a mihecaan ), numikilulay satu nu dumaan a binacadan a mabulaw sa(tinaku sa A-la-puo a tademaw (ťėŅśčČšľĮšļļ (Arabs)) atu Indu' (ŚćįŚļ¶šļļ(Indians)) malalamel aca tu i niyaduay a tademaw.

( ¶ar~…ĺifomia), (bom…ôo). . madagas ¶ar subar~…ĺ a kitidaan mikitabaki tu amir~…ĺika ¶ar~…ĺifornia ( ¶a-r~…ĺi-for-ni-ja ******), u satabakiaj nu sakas…ôpat a kitakit nu subar~…ĺ, mikir~…ĺu tu gr…ô…ônr~…ĺand , n…ôw guin…ôa (sin- ¶i-n…ô-ja ****) atu puo-r~…ĺuo- ¶uo (bom…ôo) . madagas ¶ar a subar~…ĺ idai india a baju nuatipan, u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu r~…ĺaad nu amir~…ĺika nutipan a dadipasan nu baju mibatad. (tsiŇčj d…ô b…ômarańßa nationar~…ĺ park), . sasi ŇčaŇčanaj a ¶in- ¶i dadiputan a kitidaan (tsiŇčj d…ô b…ômarańßa nationar~…ĺ park) . mińßmińß ¶aan numapaudad a makan, sisa mar~…ĺa mi ¶idakaj nu madagas ¶ar u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan a nijadu Ē~ °an, itini i kitakit ńßan ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a kir~…ĺa ¶ (***%) nu mańßidaaj u kapur~…ĺus nu sar~…ĺu , ńßina sumadaj nu kakitir~…ĺ par~…ĺuŇč nu paŇčkiwan nuńß…ôni, atu …ôn…ôm a kir~…ĺa ¶an (*%) numi ¶id…ôkaj nu bar~…ĺaut (nika i nai ku kakunas) itida nami i subar~…ĺ amaudip. (indon…ôsians),*******(br~…ĺa ¶k afri ¶ans), . mikinkiwaj tu tad…ômaw a tad…ômawan ńßan saan i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbud nu sajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i madagas ¶ar a tad…ômaw u indon…ôsia a tad…ômaw (***, indon…ôsians) ¶aaj kaw fa- ¶uo r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw (****, br~…ĺa ¶k afri ¶ans) sa, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ida ku namaka fa- ¶uo-ta-r~…ĺu tajda mabur~…ĺaw katuku i madagas ¶ar . idaw ku pabar~…ĺijuwaj tu madagas ¶ar a tad…ômaw, nababar~…ĺaki nuńß…ôni mańßka maka tuku i subar~…ĺ sa, u indon…ôsia a tad…ômaw (***, indon…ôsians)atu afri ¶a a t…ôd…ômaw (afri ¶ans, ***) umar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu midudu ¶aj a tad…ômaw sa. (arabs)****(indians)) . anuńßi ¶asa, katuudaj numikikiwaj a tad…ômaw saan, madagas ¶ar u ajdaaj ńß…ônaj nu patid…ôŇča asir~…ĺuma nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj (itini i madagas ¶ar , inai ńß…ônaj ku s…ô ¶is…ôtaj a nisur~…ĺitan nu ba Ē~ °tuaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ), numikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj satu nu dumaan a bina ¶adan a mabur~…ĺaw sa(tinaku sa a-r~…ĺa-puo a tad…ômaw (**** (arabs)) atu indu Ē~ ° (***(indians)) mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a ¶a tu i nijaduaj a tad…ômaw.
